turbocore.name: TurboCore
turbocore.tagline: AI-powered daily signals. Works with any brokerage.
turbocore.description: Follow daily AI signals to build wealth with Nasdaq-100 ETFs. No options account needed — use any brokerage, or connect Tastytrade for one-click auto-execution.
features: Daily AI regime signal — BULL / SIDEWAYS / BEAR
ML confidence score (0–100) with every signal
Virtual portfolio — AI allocates assets to your balance
Works with any brokerage — follow signals manually
Tastytrade API — submit orders with one tap or auto-approve
TQQQ + QQQ + SGOV strategy — no options access required
27.8% historical CAGR — 2× QQQ's return over 7 years
Standard dashboard & position tracker

turbocore_pro.name: TurboCore Pro
turbocore_pro.tagline: LEAPS-powered alpha. 3× QQQ returns, positive in 2022.
turbocore_pro.description: The full institutional-grade engine. Deploys QQQ LEAPS options in bull markets for amplified gains while moving 100% to T-bills in bear markets — all on autopilot. Requires options-approved brokerage account.
features: Everything in TurboCore, plus:
QQQ LEAPS options strategy — 3–4× leverage without daily ETF decay
39.3% historical CAGR — 3× QQQ's return over 7 years
+21.4% gain in 2022 — the year QQQ crashed −33%
Dynamic VIX-adjusted position sizing
Multi-layer AI regime engine (HMM + XGBoost + Neural Net)
Early signal access — signals delivered before market open
Tastytrade API — auto-submit LEAPS orders with your approval
⚠ Requires options-approved brokerage account (Level 2+)

both_bundle.name: Full Strategy Bundle
both_bundle.tagline: Every signal. Every strategy. One unstoppable system.
both_bundle.description: Run both TurboCore and TurboCore Pro simultaneously. The AI dynamically allocates between ETF momentum and LEAPS leverage based on market conditions — the most complete compounding engine we offer.
features: TurboCore + TurboCore Pro — both models running in parallel
Virtual portfolio with unified asset allocation across both strategies
Tastytrade API — full auto-execution for both ETF + LEAPS signals
Position dashboard — live P&L across all strategy layers
Discounted pricing — locked in at the lowest rate we offer
Early access to every new feature before public release
Priority support

footer.disclaimer: IMPORTANT DISCLAIMER: TradeMind@bot is a software technology platform, not a registered investment advisor, broker-dealer, or financial planner. We do not provide personalized investment advice. All trade signals are algorithmically generated and delivered identically to all subscribers. Past performance, whether actual or indicated by backtests, is not indicative of future results. Trading options involves substantial risk of loss and is not appropriate for all investors. You could lose some or all of your invested capital. Consult a qualified financial professional before making investment decisions. See full Risk Disclosure for details.
footer.cftc: CFTC RULE 4.41: Hypothetical or simulated performance results have certain limitations. Unlike an actual performance record, simulated results do not represent actual trading. Also, since the trades have not been executed, the results may have under- or over-compensated for the impact, if any, of certain market factors, such as lack of liquidity. Simulated trading programs in general are also subject to the fact that they are designed with the benefit of hindsight. No representation is being made that any account will or is likely to achieve profit or losses similar to those shown.
footer.brokerage: Brokerage services are provided by third-party broker-dealers. TradeMind@bot never holds customer funds or executes trades outside of user-authorized broker API configurations.
footer.subtitle: AI-powered trading signals for every brokerage.

onboarding.title: Getting Started — 4 Steps
onboarding.step1: Step 1: Add Email for Signal Alerts
onboarding.step1Desc: Go to Setup → enable email alerts so you get notified every time a new trade signal is generated.
onboarding.step2Desc: In Setup, toggle Auto-Approve ON to let TurboCore execute trades automatically — or leave it OFF to manually review each signal first.
onboarding.step3Desc: Link your Tastytrade account for real one-click execution. Skip this step to trade in Virtual Mode — everything still works, just paper-traded.
onboarding.step4: Step 4: Signals Arrive at 3:00 PM ET
onboarding.step4Desc: Every trading day at 3:00 PM ET, the AI engine evaluates market conditions and generates a rebalance signal for TurboCore and TurboCore Pro.

dashboard.cmdCenterP1: This is where your active signals appear and where you can approve or execute trades. Every trading day at
dashboard.cmdCenterP2: , TurboCore's AI engine evaluates volatility conditions and generates a rebalancing signal for your portfolio.
dashboard.cmdCenterP4: tabs to switch between TurboCore (equity-only) and TurboCore Pro (equity + options overlays). Toggle
dashboard.cmdCenterP5: in Setup to let trades execute automatically, or leave it off to review each signal here first.
dashboard.autoApproveDesc: Manually approve each signal before execution
dashboard.signalUpdate: Signal will update in a few seconds

ai.title: AI Copilot — Your Personal Market Analyst
ai.descP1: The AI Copilot gives you deeper insight into every trade signal and market condition. Use it to ask
ai.descP2: , request a deep dive on any ticker, or get a morning briefing tailored to the current regime.
ai.descP4: . Additional features like Deep Dive, Strategy Builder, and Trade Debrief are available as $5/mo add-ons — activate only what you need.
ai.headerDesc: Your personal market analyst powered by Perplexity Pro real-time engine.
ai.toastDemoSub: 💡 Demo mode — subscribe at trademind.bot to activate
ai.chatQ: Why is TurboCore showing SIDEWAYS regime today?
ai.chatA: The ML model detected compressed IV across QQQ options (VIX at 16.2) combined with declining volume confirming a consolidation phase. In SIDEWAYS regime, the portfolio shifts toward LEAPS for leveraged upside participation while maintaining SGOV as a liquidity buffer. The 50.2% confidence reflects genuine uncertainty — the model is near its decision boundary, suggesting a potential regime change within 3–5 sessions.
ai.toastLogin: 💡 Log in to chat with the real AI Copilot

signals.worksP1: Signals are generated every trading day at
signals.worksP2: . The AI engine reads IV (Implied Volatility), momentum, and macro conditions to determine whether the market is in a
signals.worksP3: regime — then calculates the optimal portfolio allocation for each regime.
signals.tastyDesc2: (or Auto-Approve) → orders go live in your Tastytrade account instantly. Positions appear in the Positions tab in real-time.
signals.virtDesc: Execute the trade manually using the order instructions shown, or skip it. The virtual ledger tracks your simulated portfolio based on the prices at signal time.

positions.title: Your Portfolio — Real or Virtual
positions.p1: This table shows all your open positions. If you connected Tastytrade, this reflects your
positions.p1c: — positions are pulled directly from your broker after each execution.
positions.p2c: , this is your simulated ledger. You can
positions.p2g: virtual cash at any time, and manually add or remove positions. TurboCore automatically adjusts future signal sizes to match your current virtual balance — so the strategy always stays proportional to your capital.
positions.p3: TurboCore Pro users also see their
positions.p3c: (ZEBRA, Bear Call Spread, CSP, LEAPS) tracked separately below the equity table.

activity.title: Full Trade Lifecycle Log
activity.p1: Every signal, execution, deposit, and adjustment is recorded here with a precise timestamp. This is your complete audit trail — use it to verify that signals were acted on correctly and to review historical allocation changes.
activity.p2c: : when the signal was received → when it was approved or skipped → when the virtual or live trade was executed. Filter by strategy (TurboCore vs TurboCore Pro) or search by symbol to find specific events quickly.
